home.title: Generate better branch names, commits and pull requests
home.description: Standardize your Git workflow with AI-assisted generation.

form.title: Generate better Git suggestions
form.description: Describe what changed and let the AI generate polished suggestions for commits, branches and pull requests.
form.summaryPlaceholder: Example: created the generator results UI, added copy command action and improved dark mode behavior in the navbar.
form.contextPlaceholder: Optional: mention stack, modules affected, naming convention or if it was a refactor, bugfix or new feature.
form.helper: Generates 3 to 5 suggestions with copy-ready output

emptyState.title: Your generated suggestions will appear here
emptyState.description: Describe your change, choose what you want to generate and the app will return polished suggestions for commits, branches and pull requests.

apiKeyDialog.replaceDescription: Update the connected API key to keep generating commits, branches and pull requests with your own account.
apiKeyDialog.title: Configure your API key
apiKeyDialog.description: To generate commits, branches and pull requests, connect your own OpenAI API key.
apiKeyDialog.securityDescription: Your API key is sent to the backend only to be encrypted and stored securely in a protected cookie. After that, it is not exposed again in the browser.
apiKeyDialog.securityRepositoryText: If you want, you can review the full implementation in the public project repository.
apiKeyDialog.tutorialTitle: How to get your API key

tutorialSteps.step2: Go to the API keys area in the platform dashboard.
tutorialSteps.step4: Copy the generated key and paste it into the field below.

apiKeyDialog.inputHelper: The key will be stored securely so the generator can use your own account.

errors.generic: Failed to save the API key
